students.bio: 3rd year CSE student passionate about building fintech products.
B.Com student exploring marketing roles in early-stage startups.
MBA candidate from FMCG background transitioning to startups.
Final year ECE student building IoT projects for agritech.
Mobile app developer focused on cross-platform Flutter apps.
ML enthusiast — Kaggle Expert with 5 medals.
MBA-HR student building expertise in talent operations.
Brand marketing student running my own D2C side hustle.
Backend & DevOps engineer — contributed to open source K8s.
Backend developer interested in enterprise tech.
Full-stack web dev — built 3 college tech fests' websites.
Writer & storyteller — looking to join a content team.
Aspiring product manager with sales DNA.
Front-end engineer with strong design sensibility.
Mechanical engineering student transitioning into operations analytics.
Finance MBA exploring fintech operating roles.
ECE student passionate about energy & IoT.
Data analytics student — won 2 inter-college BI hackathons.
BBA student focused on ops and customer experience.
Final year CSE — built 2 SaaS side projects.

startups.name: FinEase
startups.description: B2B fintech SaaS automating invoice reconciliation for Indian SMBs.

startups.name: EduNxt
startups.description: Personalized learning platform for Tier-2 and Tier-3 colleges.

startups.name: MediTrack
startups.description: Hospital workflow automation platform used by 200+ clinics.

startups.name: KisanAI
startups.description: AI-driven crop advisory for smallholder Indian farmers.

startups.name: LogiTrack
startups.description: Last-mile delivery optimization for D2C brands across India.

startups.name: HireFlow
startups.description: Automated hiring pipeline platform for fast-growing startups.

startups.name: LegalDesk
startups.description: Legal document automation for Indian startups and SMBs.

startups.name: GreenGrid
startups.description: Smart energy monitoring for commercial buildings and factories.

startups.name: ShopFast
startups.description: Quick-commerce platform delivering essentials in under 30 minutes.

startups.name: TravelNest
startups.description: Curated experience marketplace for offbeat Indian travel destinations.

opportunities.title: React Developer Intern
opportunities.description: Build the next-generation invoice reconciliation interface used by 200+ Indian SMBs.

opportunities.title: Performance Marketing Intern
opportunities.description: Lead our paid acquisition experiments across Google and LinkedIn.

opportunities.title: Content Writer Intern
opportunities.description: Create study guides, blog posts and exam-prep content for Tier-2 and Tier-3 college students.

opportunities.title: Android Developer Intern
opportunities.description: Shape our Android learning app used by 50,000+ college students every month.

opportunities.title: Backend Engineer Intern
opportunities.description: Build secure clinic workflow APIs serving 200+ hospitals across India.

opportunities.title: UI/UX Design Intern
opportunities.description: Design clinical workflows that nurses and doctors actually love.

opportunities.title: Machine Learning Intern
opportunities.description: Train crop-classification and yield-prediction models that reach 1M+ smallholder farmers.

opportunities.title: Data Analyst Intern
opportunities.description: Analyse last-mile delivery data for top D2C brands.

opportunities.title: Full-stack Developer Intern
opportunities.description: Build hiring pipeline features used by 100+ fast-growing startups.

opportunities.title: Growth Marketing Intern
opportunities.description: Run growth experiments to find our next 100 customers.

opportunities.title: Legal Research Intern
opportunities.description: Research startup-relevant legal documents and contribute to our template library.

opportunities.title: IoT Developer Intern
opportunities.description: Build sensor firmware and dashboards that monitor energy across 50+ commercial buildings.

opportunities.title: Product Management Intern
opportunities.description: Own a customer-facing product surface at India's fastest quick-commerce startup.

opportunities.title: Data Science Intern
opportunities.description: Build recommendation and demand forecasting models.

opportunities.title: React Developer Intern
opportunities.description: Build delightful trip-planning interfaces for offbeat India travel.
